name: Mike Nelson QuPath Extensions
description: Experimental QuPath extensions developed by Mike Nelson at LOCI, University of Wisconsin-Madison. These are prototype tools under active development -- not peer-reviewed and not yet published.

extensions.name: DL Pixel Classifier
extensions.description: Deep learning pixel classification with embedded Python inference via Appose
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: QP-CAT Cluster Analysis Tools
extensions.description: Python-powered clustering, phenotyping, and spatial analysis for multiplexed imaging data
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: Dialog Position Manager
extensions.description: Remembers and restores dialog window positions across sessions, with automatic recovery for off-screen windows
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: OCR for Labels
extensions.description: Optical character recognition for extracting text from slide labels and barcodes
extensions.author: Michael Nelson

extensions.name: QuIET - Image Export Toolkit
extensions.description: Comprehensive image export with overlays, masks, scale bars, and ML training data generation
extensions.author: Michael Nelson
